message:
feat(core,vdbe,vfs,wal): expand conformance coverage, harden FEC/WAL pipeline, and improve connection/remote-effects robustness

Major cross-crate improvements spanning correctness, performance, and test coverage:

**fsqlite-core:**
- connection.rs: Extensive rework of connection handling with improved error paths,
  statement lifecycle management, and cross-connection coordination (~495 lines changed)
- remote_effects.rs: Substantially expanded remote effect processing with new
  operation types, better error recovery, and retry semantics (+733 lines)
- tiered_storage.rs: Enhanced tiered storage layer with improved eviction policies,
  compaction logic, and capacity management (+309 lines)
- compat_persist.rs: Persistence compatibility layer refinements for format migration
- raptorq_codec.rs: Improved RaptorQ FEC codec with better block size handling,
  symbol alignment, and edge-case coverage (+198 lines)
- raptorq_integration.rs: Minor integration adjustments for updated codec API
- NEW conformance_oracle_s55.rs: 3450-line comprehensive conformance test suite
  comparing FrankenSQLite behavior against SQLite reference oracle

**fsqlite-pager:**
- pager.rs: Refined page management with improved locking semantics and header
  synchronization

**fsqlite-types:**
- cx.rs: Extended context type definitions for new runtime capabilities

**fsqlite-vdbe:**
- engine.rs: VDBE engine improvements for opcode execution paths and memory
  management (+177 lines)
- vectorized_scan.rs: Expanded vectorized scan operators with new filter/projection
  capabilities
- benches/vectorized_scan.rs: Additional benchmark coverage

**fsqlite-vfs:**
- unix.rs: Significant VFS layer rework with improved file locking, I/O path
  optimization, and cross-process safety (+226 lines)

**fsqlite-wal:**
- per_core_buffer.rs: Reworked per-core WAL buffering with improved concurrency
  characteristics and memory management (+238 lines)
- wal_fec.rs: Enhanced WAL forward error correction with improved recovery
  semantics and pipeline integration (+276 lines)
- tests/wal_fec_pipeline.rs: Substantially reworked FEC pipeline test suite with
  new scenarios and improved assertion coverage (~607 lines changed)

**fsqlite-mvcc:**
- invariants.rs: Additional MVCC invariant assertions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
